display.purpose: Hero name only. Used once per page.

body.purpose: All prose. Line length capped at 70ch.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Card and button hover state — diffuse lift, no ambient shadow at rest.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (ease-out-expo approximation).

motion.name: ease-smooth
motion.purpose: Smooth deceleration for reveals and entrances.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Page load reveals and section entrances.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filled Editorial Gold call-to-action. Used once per section at most.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #C89B3C; color: #fff; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 12px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #B88A2E; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C89B3C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outlined ghost button for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #1E1D1B; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 12px 28px; border: 1px solid #706C66; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F7F6F4; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C89B3C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. Flat at rest, subtle hover lift.
components.html:
Project Title

A short description of the project and what it demonstrates.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #F7F6F4; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1E1D1B; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #706C66; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Chip / Tag
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; padding: 4px 14px; background: #F7F6F4; color: #706C66; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #E8E6E2; border-radius: 999px; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #C89B3C; color: #1E1D1B; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1E1D1B; } .ds-input { padding: 10px 16px; background: #F7F6F4; color: #1E1D1B; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; border: 1px solid #E8E6E2; border-radius: 6px; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #706C66; opacity: 0.5; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #C89B3C; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(200,155,60,0.1); }

narrative.overview:
A personal portfolio that presents its owner as both a precise engineer and a thoughtful designer. The metaphor is an architect's studio — clean sightlines, natural materials, considered layouts where every element has structural purpose. Nothing is decorative; everything is load-bearing.

The site is itself a proof of craft. The infrastructure animation (traveling data packets through a cloud architecture diagram) is the signature element — a live demonstration that the person behind this portfolio understands systems from the network edge to the pixel.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial precision. Typography-first hierarchy. Serif display headings pair with a clean sans-serif body for warmth + clarity.
Engineered restraint. One signature animated element (the infra diagram) and one signature palette move (warm gold primary on pure white). Everything else steps back.
Flat-by-default, alive on interaction. Surfaces sit flat at rest. Hover states introduce subtle lift — the only depth in the system.
Gold ink on white paper. The brand color (a Klim-style editorial gold) is used sparingly — ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity is its power.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Primary gold appears on ≤10% of any viewport. Its scarcity is what makes it read as intentional rather than decorative.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Display and body use different families by design. Inter is never used for display headings; Instrument Serif is never used for body copy.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state.

dos: Use Editorial Gold sparingly — ≤10% of any viewport.
Use `text-wrap: balance` on display and headline text.
Keep body line length between 65–75 characters.
Use flat surfaces at rest; lift only on hover for interactive elements.
Use the infra animation as the signature visual — it proves the "architect" claim.
Let whitespace do the work of separation rather than borders and shadows.
donts: Don't use the terminal-green-on-dark cliché, glassmorphism, gradient text, or purple-to-blue gradients.
Don't use warm cream/beige/sand backgrounds — the bg is pure white.
Don't put cards inside cards — flatten the hierarchy.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient).
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow text ("ABOUT", "PROCESS") above every section.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing — use ease-out-expo or linear for motion.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, padding) — use transform and opacity only.
Don't use placeholder images (`via.placeholder.com`) or fake project data.
